ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "check_number" INTEGER /* Check number associated with the transaction */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor receiving the payment */,
  "state_fund_amount" TEXT /* Amount of state funds used in the transaction */,
  "federal_fund_amount" TEXT /* Amount of federal funds used in the transaction */,
  "local_fund_amount" TEXT /* Amount of local funds used in the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the transaction */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department initiating the transaction */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the transaction */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was approved */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person's name */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the vendor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax Identification Number (TIN) of the vendor */,
  "bank_account" TEXT /* Bank account details for payments */,
  "status" TEXT /* Vendor status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_sources" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund source */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fund source */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year to which the fund is allocated */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_fund_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund allocation */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial transaction */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund source */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount allocated from the fund source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_fund_allocations_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES fund_sources ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_fund_allocations_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES financial_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the department manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the department */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "remaining_budget" TEXT /* Remaining budget after expenditures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department responsible for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Project status (e.g., in progress, completed, on hold) */,
  "spending" TEXT /* Total amount spent on the project */,
  "remaining_budget" TEXT /* Remaining budget for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_projects" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project allocation */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial transaction */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount allocated to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_projects_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES financial_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance officer, procurement manager) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced, 3 for admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the transaction was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES financial_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the vendor */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the vendor's performance */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_period" TEXT /* Period for which the evaluation was conducted (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_performance_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_performance_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor involved in the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the contract */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired, terminated) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract is up for renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor submitting the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was submitted */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the payment */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, wire transfer, ACH) */,
  "invoice_status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, disputed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, wire transfer, ACH) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)
